## Non-Destructive Control Statement

RE-11 is entirely non-destructive. No records were created, updated, or deleted. No UI, navigation, permissions, TXQuote, reporting, documents, scoped services, MGA UI, frontend reads, or end-user behavior was changed. RE-11 is a pure live-data read and cross-reference validation against the full remediation execution record.

## Section 4 — Second Dry-Run Approval Gate

RE-11 has passed all 25 reconciliation checks. The controlled remediation batch REMEDIATION-BATCH-4A-20260504 is complete and validated.

**The second non-destructive dry-run approval gate is now presentable.**

### Gate conditions met

| Condition | Status |
|---|---|
| RE-01 through RE-11 complete | ✅ YES |
| All P0 BA items (BA-01 through BA-17) resolved at execution level | ✅ YES |
| B4B-01 through B4B-05 resolved at execution level | ✅ YES |
| B4B-06 not blocking second dry-run at current scale | ✅ YES (small dataset; B4B-06 still blocks Phase 4B) |
| RE-11 reconciliation passed (25/25) | ✅ YES |
| No unauthorized mutations exist | ✅ YES |
| No fake scope assignments | ✅ YES |
| No quarantined records MGA-visible | ✅ YES |

### Gate conditions not yet met

| Condition | Status |
|---|---|
| Owner explicit approval of second dry-run | ❌ NOT YET — approval gate must be reviewed and approved by owner before execution |
| B4B-06 DBA confirmation (required for Phase 4B, not second dry-run) | ❌ PENDING — does not block second dry-run at current scale |

### What the second dry-run will do (when approved)

The second dry-run will:
- re-execute the Phase 4A dry-run engine against live data in its current state
- validate all 14 Phase 4A acceptance thresholds
- confirm that the remediation changes produce a clean mapping result
- generate a new reconciliation report
- produce a pass/fail determination for Phase 4B eligibility

**The second dry-run must NOT execute automatically.** It requires explicit owner approval before execution.

**Phase 4B must NOT begin** until the second dry-run passes all 14 acceptance thresholds AND B4B-06 is fully resolved by DBA confirmation.
